text: Allow me to be the first to drop something in here! My name is BriittyBear, all my friends call me B ! I'm a solo sloop PVPer 90% of the time, and would to branch out and sail with new friends if anyone would like to! Please shoot me a DM if you want to set something up! Cheers! Warnings: I LOVE keg plays, and I WILL eat rare fish if we find them, including Shadow Stormfish, so keep them in your pockets if you want to turn them in!
i can vouch on the rare fish eating
I can now vouch in the keg plays
@BriittyBear Down
If anyone would like to do some streamloots Monday or Tuesday let me know in the DM’s! @here

I see the collabs section has had a nice refresh! I've been a little out of the loop recently (okay so a lot) as I've had a lot going on "behind-the-screens"... but still hopping on the Seas when I can get a crew together! I am 100% a Gally nerd, so sometimes I struggle getting a crew together. I know I know.. sloop is life for most... but it's the Gally that took my heart. I'm not much of a solo player at all, so I'd really like to try make some new pirate friends who won't hate me for being a bit of a silly sausage (I will absolutely fall off the ship 500 times and burn myself with firebombs. ) and enjoy a full crew life! I PvP when I have to, but mostly a wholesome pirate. Please feel free to reach out if you'd like to sail sometime! Happy to do Multi Links / Squad Streams. I stream Monday, Tuesday, Thursday and Friday 12PM-6/7PM BST (or GMT when we're in GMT here in the UK) (If you send me a friend request here on Discord please ping me or I won't see it because I'm a lemon. You can also DM me on Twitter etc.! )

Hey guys! I'm CJSHIZ but I usually just go by CJ. After a schedule change I have now transitioned from an overnight streamer to a day/evening time streamer. I have wanted to sail with many of you but felt like I never could because of the timing. Now that my schedule changed I want to hit the seas and get to know more people in here!! I am a PvP oriented gamer that loves to meme around! If any of you gamers are down for a sail feel free to DM me and we can set something up!!

Hey everyone! I've been working on this for months but it's finally live: Scurvy Scroll - SoT's first PvP voyage! Start with only pistol/bananas and sink ships/do challenges to purchase your equipment back. Free and not against ToS, I invite you all to check it out and use it on stream as well! https://twitter.com/Blurbstv/status/1527343155297030144 (edited)
https://scurvyscroll.com

Ok hello everyone! So as you all know, there is a thing called Christmas coming up, happens once a year I hear.... So, this is a little self centered. But I hold a community night every Friday on my discord, where a bunch of chatters and subs etc who are very much "part of the community" (you have probably seen them in your chats) all get together and just have a couple of drinks, and talk about gaming, and usually play a few games and just generally get up to come nonsense. I think it's safe to say that ANY of you here are well known by most of them. And I would love to invite you to a community night on December 23rd at 6pm (GMT). The peeps there would LOVE to see you make an appearance, and this also goes out to all the developers, i'll be reaching out to some of them individually. Xmas time is a fun time for most, but also a very lonely time for some people, and having an "exclusive" interaction with some of the bigger community members would honestly lift some spirits. Please consider coming along, even if its just to say "HI!" and then leave!
If you're intersted, please say so in here, and join my discord, and i'll give you the permission to see the chat room etc.
https://discord.gg/5DGuSug

EVERFYONE is invited for AweCoop's Sink Race Event! Jan 14th, 11am EST Most boats sunk in 4 hours. Sloop- solo or duo only ANYONE can sign up (must have stream pov for BOTH players) Every sink is 1 point can also sink boats in regular adventure but must be trying to also actively dive. If you reach a 5 streak and lower down bonus 10 points 10 streak +20 points If you take a champion fight and win +15 points vs a brig, +20 vs galleon Will have a separate discord for event so mods or streamers can post updates. We will also have a active leaderboard browser overlay that shows the top 5 teams at all times if you sink one of these teams while they are at top 5 from the start of the fight +5 points more info will be posted in the discord once we have it fully up and running! https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/888867091879444560/1050277759525601330/sinkrace.png

Looking to organise some collaborations over the Frozen Horizon Drops period! YouTube video recording or live Twitch content. Any time from 2am-3pm UTC, keen to sail with some new people, message me if you're keen (edited)

Hey folks. So on Friday, i'm going to host a custom server from 12pm until 4:30pm GMT. We're going to lace Golden Sands in loot. No reason at all other than it'll look pretty, and that's it! Anyone who is available in that time bracket, let me know, i'll get you invited!
Figured it'd be a nice break from all the sweating!
And yunno... Merry Chryesler!

I want to get as many people as I can get involved into this campaign as I can! THE GOAL To raise a quarter of a million (or more) in around 365 days for Mind. Mind are a charity that deal with those suffering from mental health problems, they offer support and counsel to millions of people every year, and they're completely fundraiser based. We all deal with some form of mental strain and I feel like it's something most people can relate to. Not only that you could potentially save millions of lives. You don't need to have this running all year round if you have other charity obligations, anything will help! If you are interested. Please click here to be invited to the team: https://tiltify.com/team-invite/uq5jsdRoEgw84Uv3Pp8b6u5 Here is the Overlay for the fundraiser. In OBS just add a new Browser Source to your scene, and copy in this link, position it as you would like: https://overlays.tiltify.com/oThvTTcKoUHn6JtqOiIb5dBmDldUmGUj And here is the donation page: https://tiltify.com/+mindful-marauders/mindful-marauders
Also I should state, if you join, please don't say "Falcores doing this fundraiser" I don't want to take any sort of clout for this. Just say "A bunch of us have decided to do this thing!"
Nah I'll just advertise it as 'Falcore doesn't reply to his goddamn dm's'
I was just responding! (I don't do Mondays anymore)

Hey @Partners , We are currently helping Mental Health UK with their upcoming campaign and they asked us to reach out and see if any of you would be interested to take part. They are LOVELY people to work with, here is their invitation and all the details. If you wish to join the event, please either dm me or contact Scott Hall from MHUK via this email - sh@kuoda.uk "Mental Health UK are working with content creators across January to raise the awareness of mental health across the digital space. The focus is to #starttheyearstrong and to highlight the importance of understanding your own mental health and how to look after it. We will be setting up discussions around experiences that content creators have had with their own mental health and with mental health professionals. Through the month we will be sending out social posts to highlight the campaign and at the end of the month we will be running our Q and A sessions focused in on mental health. Within the final week of the month we would like to set up a day on Sea of Thieves. We will be looking to utilise a private server and have our crews working on the PvE missions while in game. At the same time we will be encouraging our content creators to discuss mental health topics throughout, when it feels natural, in the downtime such as sailing between locations. As a final part to the day are looking to create a sit down conversation in a beautiful location on the server were all the content creators taking part can have a discussion around mental health, their experiences and our professionals will help with the support. We would love for a few of the Content Crew to get involved to help the less experienced through the game and also to join in on raising awareness around Mental Health. It is up to you how much you would like to get involved, we have social posts planned which you can join in on and share and through the final period in January all our content creators will be fundraising on stream. Rare have kindly supported us with game keys, ancient coins and skin giveaways which you can offer to your communities and if you wished to get further involved we will be running a gleam giveaway as we hit certain milestones giving away products including a GPU, a Noble gaming chair, peripherals, memory and a screen. The main organised content will be from 23rd Jan to 31st Jan 2022. Along with raising awareness we will be setting up fundraising for across the month on Tiltify. We will be providing graphics and overlays to support in this and setting out the schedule for the content in conjunction with Mental Health UK" (edited)
Yes please Anna, Will DM you now
please include me ❤️
Would LOVE to be involved in this!

Evening @Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate !! Soooo..... SoT Fest 2023 is so near I can't believe it has come round so quick! We have a fun packed day and our Schedule is packed with lots of things going at the venue over 2 stages All funds raised outside our overheads is being donated to Charity which this year we are raising for EveryoneCan. We will have an Online raffle before hand and then the mega one on the day. We have a number of panels going on which some of the Partners are already taking part in - so yeah lots is going to be happening I thought I would open up to you all and to see if anyone of the Partners and Affiliates would like to contribute to the event. Could be some of your merch for the raffle or simply something you have created. We have SoT Portugal creating a Trading card game of the panellists which is awesome. The Arrt Club has created an amazing limited edition art work for T shirts we will be selling on the day, with a few other things in the pipe line. I know we have some really talented folk here so if anyone wants to get involved but can't on the day then give me a shout - this event is about the community and we want to show you all off as best as we can We will also be having a "Meet and Greet" area where we want to offer a space for Streamers to meet their fans on a more one on one basis. We plan to have a photo opportunity area so we will be able to capture some great shots with your fans! We want to open this to all the Partnered streamers as we were very short on time to fit you all on panels so if anyone is interested in this who is coming to SoT Fest please drop me a DM. It will be a first come first basis but we will have a little more scope with getting more of you involved on the day Have a good weekend guys!!

@Partners @Partner Legends Ahoy legends! In April Cutlass Crusades will be celebrating its 2 Year anniversary. What better way to celebrate than joining the Affiliate Alliance and we plan on hosting an ALL SoT Partner and Partner Legends Cutlass Crusades tournament raising money and awareness for a chosen charity (TBD Shortly). We are looking for Sloop crews to take part in this and I wanted to open the applications to you all. We already have the wonderful @BriittyBear and @LDSylvr confirmed. The details for the event are as follows: Event Type: Casted PvPvE event (twitch.tv/cutlasscrusades) Ship Type: Sloops - 5 Crews Date/Time: Saturday, 8 April 2023 4:00:00 PM Charity: TBD Prize: Winning team wins a set of AA sails each If you are interested in joining please let us know below or any questions please ask myself or @SourScar [Cutlass Crusades] . (edited)

Hey all! We've been working for the past few weeks on an exciting game event which we plan to release next week, on Friday 21st. The story revolves around Missing Ships and we need your help to tease the event, we are looking to create a series of at least 6 posters featuring ships that have gone missing. If you are interested in participating, here is what we need from you: A clear photo of your ship against a neutral background (such as a blue sky/sea) and with good lighting (see the attached image for reference) The name of your ship Your pirate name (and optionally, your Twitter handle, if you would like us to mention you)

It's that time of year! @Partners @Partner Legends @Affiliate St Jude Play Live 2023 has started! For the entire month of May, creators from all over the world are raising funds for St Jude Children's Hospital. Join our Sea of Thieves team and help us to end childhood Cancer. Click the team Tiltify link here Log into Tiltify with your Twitch and create your Support Campaign. https://tiltify.com/+sailing-for-charity/sailing-for-charity-2023/start Then you can use this link to grab all your St Jude Overlays and Alerts : https://playlive.experience.stjude.org/ You can get Videos and other Branding for your stream and campaign by registering on St Jude Brand Central. When Registering you can use the name 'Amanda Hill' as your contact with St Jude: https://brand.stjude.org/login If anyone needs any help please do not hesitate to reach out to me. ( Send me a Friend request on discord Freyline#0666 ) St. Jude Children’s Research Hospital® is leading the way the world understands, treats, and defeats childhood cancer and other life-threatening diseases. They then share this research with Hospitals all over the world. Not just for kids, but for EVERYONE. If you cannot help by donating or raising funds with your own campaign, you can also create an Amplify link to share on your own social media and with friends and family. https://tiltify.com/+sailing-for-charity/sailing-for-charity-2023/amplify Please Join us in supporting the amazing work that St Jude does to change the world. (edited)

Hello dear @Affiliate s. @Dedro and @hypled [SoT ITA] have a collaboration proposal for you. We want to host our survival game, The Forgotten, in each affiliated community and develop it into a tournament. In turn, we want to let your communities play. The game will be played in duo teams. Each month, one community will host the survival game. After each participating community has obtained its two winners, these players will compete against the winners of the other communities in a final match, to decree the champions of The Forgotten. Dedro will broadcast the event on its channel in Italian and English. If there is a streamer partner belonging to a community of another language, a stream squad will be set up so that the event is understandable to all viewers. We want to involve the whole big Sea of Thieves family. What do you think? Can you give us a hand in this huge project? ❤️
▶️ The Forgotten: https://forms.gle/KAN7oKWoqj9rEZJN7 (edited)

Hey guys @Affiliate over in Arrt Club we're looking to gather more artists for a community Arrt Swap! I'd greatly appreciate help spreading word about it. Here's the text if anyone would be kind enough to share: --------- ️ ARRT SWAP ️ Hello there fellow pirates! We are excited to announce that the Arrt Club will be hosting an art swap during August - September for anyone who wants to come along and create some art. What is it? : An art swap is an event where you submit pictures of your pirate and you receive someone else's pirate in return. You will have around a month to create a piece of art of that pirate and once the event is finished, you will receive a brand new sparkly artwork of your own pirate that someone else created! You can see some examples from the previous art swap below. When? : Sign-ups end on August 19 and the final artworks are due September 22 Additional info : You don't have to be the most amazing artist to participate, we just want people to have fun and give it a try. There will also be no giveaway prizes for participating, your reward for joining in is a beautiful artwork of your own pirate at the end~ Come along and join us in creating some art- We have additional details in our announcements channel in our server, as well as a sign-up channel. https://discord.gg/5nfEWuGQaS

Hi folks! Tonight, I launched a new SoT Community called Sunken Thieves on Discord. The vision is a simple one: giving players the opportunity to better their skills, in whatever area of the game they choose to participate in. We have Coaches available in PvP, Screenshot-taking and Content Creation. If you would like to get involved as a coach, we have spaces for Content Creation and Screenshots currently open. Time-wise, there’s no set limit on what you need to offer to be a Coach, just occasionally hop in and offer advice where you can to eager swabbies! If you’d like to get involved, please drop me a DM. This is the link if you’d like to join and get involved too: https://discord.gg/bfxmfRvfVx

For our August event, we're opening sign ups to any brigantine crews with at least 2 Twitch streamers to help raise awareness and funds for the Wolf Conservation Center . We have a new method for competitor sign ups moving forward! No more ugly Google Forms! How to sign up? Head to: https://cutlasscrusades.com/signup Recommended : Sign in with Twitch Optional: Register with email, username, and password Get Signed Up Select the Sign Up Now button from the Homepage or Dashboard READ and agree to the requirements/rules Fill out the short form Head to the My Crew tab Invite your crew to get signed up by sharing the Invitation Info ALL crew members must be signed in via Twitch login or registered with an email. Selected crews will be announced the following day after the sign up deadline. Ahoy Fellow Pirates! Cutlass Crusades #47 is our 47th consecutive month raising awareness and funds for various charities. For Saturday, 15 February 2025 5:00 PM , we're inviting all North American crews to join us in support of the American Heart Association and their mission to be a relentless force for a world of longer, healthier lives. Who are we looking for? Competing brigantine crews made up of players from anywhere in North America. Competing crews must have at least 2 members who will stream live on Twitch during the event. (more are preferred) Where do you sign up? https://cutlasscrusades.com/ If you haven't already, register on our website, preferably using your Twitch login. We need to know who's who... Join our discord here: https://discord.gg/cutlasscrusades Make sure your usernames match between Discord and the website. If needed, open a Twitch Verification Support Ticket in ⁠open-a-ticket. If you didn't register using your Twitch login, you can request a name change on the website by going to Dashboard > Settings. If your name is different between our website and this Discord, we may not be able to contact you and you'll be replaced. (Competing Crews) Once you're registered on our website, head to Dashboard > Sign Up and follow the steps to get you and your crew signed up. (this is a show of interest and not a guaranteed spot, selected crews will be announced within 24-48 of the deadline.

Ahoy pirates, Welcome to the Compote Crew tournament. This tournament is a shipfight in a brigantine, just like Allegiance. The players can represent their team in order to win this tournament which will be in the form of Bracket and which will take place over 3 days. Tournament rules : Use only the resources you are given. Any form of toxicity or offensive language is prohibited and punishable by instant disqualification. A zone will be defined on your map table and the slightest exit will result in defeat. Running is also forbidden and punishable by disqualification, keep in mind that each shipfight will be time-limited. Do not make decisions on your own, consult a referee when you need to. A stream will be required for each participant for security purposes and out of respect for other players (stream hacking will be punished). If you do not have the ability to stream, it isn't necessary to apply, your form will be deleted instantly. It is forbidden to take your opponent's storage crate (you can only steal resources in it). If you are not present at the tournament, and you do not have a replacement, you will be disqualified and you will be registered on a list which will withdraw your right to take part in tournaments and giveaways (if you're not available, please let us know at least 24 hours in advance). Dates and times : Saturday 8 March 3pm CET Saturday 22 March 3pm CET Saturday 29 March 3pm CET https://forms.gle/AqyMrWTfAvwu4NnR9

Howdy @Partners !! I'm going to be putting on an event that's going to run the course of a couple months most likely. Unlike all my other events I've hosted, this one will be different and based solely around PvE. Each participant will be invited to my ship where they will run the PvE Gauntlet of Raid Voyages from the Sea Fortresses non-stop all the way through the Flameheart Armada. ( Shrines will be excluded from the Gauntlet due to the total RNG of them ) I'm extending this invite out to you guys as it puts you against the community and will be fun for all of our viewers to be able to compete against our times. I also think this will be a good opportunity for those of you heavily involved with YouTube content to be able to make a couple videos out of this, not only with your own attempt of the Gauntlet, but with Tips & Tricks content on what exactly is the best, fastest method, etc for doing Raid Voyages and World Events. As far as prizes go, I'm thinking the Top 3 will earn a cash prize and the overall winner will also receive a trophy. Perhaps @H1gh Voltage can offer some more insight on incentives and/or prizes if Rare wants to get involved with it as well. If you're interested, please reach out to me and we can figure out a time slot to get your run. Looking forward to hearing from you guys! NOTE : In order for your run to count, I HAVE TO BE on the same ship with you. Everyone who competes in this event will do so as a duo-sloop (boss health) with me as only a spectator. I will not be involved with any of the PvE. My only job is to ensure the next Raid Voyage is down on the table and ready to go before you make it back to the ship. (edited)
